input:
<document id="D1" date="2025-11-03">
Northwind Robotics Q3 pricing brief: the RX-200 arm unit is priced at $18,500 per unit for orders under 10 units.
</document>

<document id="D2" date="2026-02-14">
Northwind Robotics Q1 2026 pricing update: due to component cost changes, the RX-200 arm unit is now priced at $21,000 per unit for orders under 10 units. This supersedes the Q3 2025 pricing brief.
</document>

<document id="D3" date="2026-01-20">
Northwind Robotics office relocation notice: the Austin office will move to a new address effective March 2026.
</document>

Question: What is the current price of the RX-200 arm unit for an order of 5 units?

<document id="D1" date="2026-03-01">
Engineering headcount update: the Perception team has 14 engineers as of March 2026.
</document>

<document id="D2" date="2026-05-18">
Engineering headcount update: following the Q2 reorg, the Perception team now has 19 engineers as of May 2026. This supersedes the March 2026 figure.
</document>

<document id="D3" date="2026-04-02">
Facilities note: the Perception team's desks were relocated to the 4th floor.
</document>

Question: How many engineers are currently on the Perception team?

<document id="D1" date="2026-01-10">
Product roadmap: the RX-300 successor unit is targeted for launch in Q4 2026.
</document>

<document id="D2" date="2026-06-05">
Product roadmap update: the RX-300 successor unit launch has slipped to Q1 2027 due to supplier delays. This supersedes the Q4 2026 target date.
</document>

<document id="D3" date="2026-02-11">
Marketing note: the RX-300 unit will be branded 'RX-300 Pro' at launch.
</document>

Question: When is the RX-300 successor unit currently expected to launch?

<document id="D1" date="2025-09-12">
Partnership status: Northwind Robotics is in early talks with Meridian Logistics about a warehouse-automation pilot.
</document>

<document id="D2" date="2026-04-22">
Partnership status update: the Meridian Logistics pilot discussed in September 2025 concluded with no signed agreement; Meridian instead partnered with a competitor. This supersedes the September 2025 update.
</document>

<document id="D3" date="2026-03-30">
Internal note: Northwind Robotics signed a new pilot agreement with Ferro Systems in March 2026.
</document>

Question: What is the status of the Meridian Logistics partnership?

<document id="D1" date="2026-02-01">
Warehouse capacity note: the Reno fulfillment center has a maximum throughput of 4,000 units/day.
</document>

<document id="D2" date="2026-05-30">
Warehouse capacity update: following the Reno fulfillment center expansion completed in May 2026, maximum throughput is now 6,500 units/day. This supersedes the February 2026 figure.
</document>

<document id="D3" date="2026-04-15">
HR note: the Reno fulfillment center added a second shift supervisor role in April 2026.
</document>

Question: What is the maximum daily throughput of the Reno fulfillment center?

<document id="D1" date="2026-06-01">
Compliance note: Northwind Robotics' ISO 9001 certification is valid through December 2027 and is the current source of record for certification status; it is reviewed annually but not reissued unless changes occur.
</document>

<document id="D2" date="2026-01-05">
Older audit summary: a 2025 internal audit flagged two minor non-conformities, both closed by February 2026.
</document>

<document id="D3" date="2026-03-18">
Facilities note: the Reno fulfillment center's fire suppression system was inspected and passed in March 2026.
</document>

Question: Is Northwind Robotics' ISO 9001 certification currently valid, and through when?

<document id="D1" date="2025-08-20">
Staffing note: the Customer Success team is led by interim manager Dana Whitfield.
</document>

<document id="D2" date="2026-01-15">
Staffing update: Priya Deshmukh was hired as permanent Customer Success manager in January 2026, replacing interim manager Dana Whitfield. This supersedes the August 2025 note.
</document>

<document id="D3" date="2026-02-08">
Facilities note: the Customer Success team relocated to the 2nd floor in February 2026.
</document>

Question: Who currently manages the Customer Success team?

forbidden_claims: Dana Whitfield is the permanent manager

input:
<document id="D1" date="2026-03-01">
Battery spec sheet: the RX-200's standard battery pack rated capacity is 2.4 kWh.
</document>

<document id="D2" date="2026-03-01">
Battery spec addendum, same date: for the extended-range option (sold separately), the RX-200 battery pack rated capacity is 3.6 kWh. This is a separate SKU, not a supersession of the standard pack spec.
</document>

<document id="D3" date="2025-12-11">
Shipping note: RX-200 units ship in reinforced crates as of December 2025.
</document>

Question: What is the rated capacity of the RX-200's standard (non-extended-range) battery pack?
